name: files
description: Selected files (bindable).

name: multiple
description: Allow multiple.

name: accept
description: Native `accept` filter (e.g. `'image/*'`, `'.pdf,.doc'`). Also enforced on drop.

name: maxSize
description: Reject files larger than this many bytes.

name: maxFiles
description: Cap the total number of files.

name: variant
description: Visual variant of the inner drop area. `'default'` is dashed; `'flat'` soft fill; `'border'` solid 2px.

name: size
description: Predefined size — same scale as Button/Input.

name: color
description: Palette accent.

name: disabled
description: Disabled.

name: buttonOnly
description: Render as a single button — no card chrome, no list.

name: wide
description: Wider max-width (`480px` vs default `360px`), matching `Card`'s `wide`.

name: fullWidth
description: Drop the max-width cap and stretch to the parent container. Mutually exclusive with `wide`.

name: clearable
description: Force a `Clear all` action in the footer when files are selected.

name: showList
description: Hide the list even when files are selected.

name: thumbnails
description: Force-on / force-off image thumbnails. Defaults to auto (any image file in the list).

name: label
description: Drop-zone primary label (the bold headline).

name: sublabel
description: Drop-zone secondary line under `label`. Default: `'or click to browse'`.

name: hint
description: Tertiary hint under the dropzone (e.g. `'PNG, JPG up to 5 MB'`).

name: error
description: External error message. Pair with `onerror`. Replaces `hint` when set.

name: children
description: Custom drop-zone content (replaces icon + label).

name: item
description: Custom rendering of one list item. Overrides the built-in row.

name: footer
description: Custom footer (replaces the built-in "N files · size · clear" row).

name: onchange
description: Fired on file selection / drop after validation.

name: onerror
description: Fired with rejected files when validation trims the input.
